javascript:!function(){function e(e){return String(e).padStart(2,"0")}function t(t){return t.getFullYear()+e(t.getMonth()+1)+e(t.getDate())}function r(r){return t(r)+"T"+e(r.getHours())+e(r.getMinutes())+"00"}function a(e){return String(e||"").replace(/[\uff01-\uff5e]/g,function(e){return String.fromCharCode(e.charCodeAt(0)-65248)}).replace(/\u3000/g," ").replace(/[\u301c\uff5e]/g,"~").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim()}try{var n=String(window.getSelection?window.getSelection():"").trim();if(!n)return void alert("\u30c6\u30ad\u30b9\u30c8\u3092\u9078\u629e\u3057\u3066\u304b\u3089\u5b9f\u884c\u3057\u3066\u304f\u3060\u3055\u3044\u3002");var d=function(e,t){var r=a(e);function n(e){return new Date(e.getFullYear(),e.getMonth(),e.getDate())}function d(e,r,a){return n(new Date(e,r-1,a))<n(t)?e+1:e}t=t||new Date;var s=r.match(/\u5e73\u6210\s*(\d{1,2})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5(?:.*?)(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})(?:.*?)(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\.(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})(?:.*?)(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5(?:.*?)(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/);if(s){var u=/\u5e73\u6210/.test(r)?1988+Number(s[1]):Number(s[1]),i=Number(s[2]),m=Number(s[3]),l=Number(s[4]),o=Number(s[5]),g=new Date(u,i-1,m,l%24,o,0);l>=24&&g.setDate(g.getDate()+Math.floor(l/24));var c=new Date(g.getTime());return c.setMinutes(c.getMinutes()+60),{start:g,end:c,allDay:!1}}var D=r.match(/\b(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})(?:\s*\([\u6708\u706b\u6c34\u6728\u91d1\u571f\u65e5]\))?(?:.*?)(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/);if(D){var b=d(t.getFullYear(),Number(D[1]),Number(D[2])),h=Number(D[3]),f=Number(D[4]),v=new Date(b,Number(D[1])-1,Number(D[2]),h%24,f,0);h>=24&&v.setDate(v.getDate()+Math.floor(h/24));var N=new Date(v.getTime());return N.setMinutes(N.getMinutes()+60),{start:v,end:N,allDay:!1}}var w=r.match(/\u5e73\u6210\s*(\d{1,2})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\.(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})/)||r.match(/(\d{4})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5/)||r.match(/\b(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})(?!\/)/)||r.match(/(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5/);if(w){var M,S,p=t.getFullYear();/\u5e73\u6210/.test(r)?(p=1988+Number(w[1]),M=Number(w[2]),S=Number(w[3])):/^\d{4}([\/\.\u5e74])/.test(w[0])?(p=Number(w[1]),M=Number(w[2]),S=Number(w[3])):/^\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}$/.test(w[0])?p=d(p,M=Number(w[1]),S=Number(w[2])):(M=Number(w[1]),S=Number(w[2]));var y=new Date(p,M-1,S),T=new Date(y.getTime());return T.setDate(T.getDate()+1),{start:y,end:T,allDay:!0}}var F=/\u660e\u65e5/.test(r)?1:0,Y=/\u660e\u65e5|\u4eca\u65e5/.test(r),k=new Date(t.getFullYear(),t.getMonth(),t.getDate()+F),$=r.match(/(\u6b63\u5348|\u5348\u5f8c\s*[\u4e00\u4e8c\u4e09\u56db\u4e94\u516d\u4e03\u516b\u4e5d\u5341\d]+\u6642|\u5348\u524d\s*[\u4e00\u4e8c\u4e09\u56db\u4e94\u516d\u4e03\u516b\u4e5d\u5341\d]+\u6642|\d{1,2}:\d{2}|\d{1,2}\u6642)/);if(!$){if(!Y)return null;var C=new Date(k.getTime());return C.setDate(C.getDate()+1),{start:k,end:C,allDay:!0}}var A=0,L=0;if(/\u6b63\u5348/.test($[1]))A=12;else if(/\d{1,2}:\d{2}/.test($[1])){var R=$[1].match(/(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/);A=Number(R[1]),L=Number(R[2])}else{var U=$[1].match(/([\u4e00\u4e8c\u4e09\u56db\u4e94\u516d\u4e03\u516b\u4e5d\u5341\d]+)\u6642/),x=U?U[1]:"0",z={"\u4e00":1,"\u4e8c":2,"\u4e09":3,"\u56db":4,"\u4e94":5,"\u516d":6,"\u4e03":7,"\u516b":8,"\u4e5d":9};A=/^\d+$/.test(x)?Number(x):"\u5341"===x?10:/^[\u4e00\u4e8c\u4e09\u56db\u4e94\u516d\u4e03\u516b\u4e5d]\u5341$/.test(x)?10*z[x[0]]:/^\u5341[\u4e00\u4e8c\u4e09\u56db\u4e94\u516d\u4e03\u516b\u4e5d]$/.test(x)?10+z[x[1]]:z[x]||0,/\u5348\u5f8c/.test($[1])&&A<12&&(A+=12)}var B=new Date(k.getFullYear(),k.getMonth(),k.getDate(),A%24,L,0);A>=24&&B.setDate(B.getDate()+Math.floor(A/24));var H=new Date(B.getTime());return H.setMinutes(H.getMinutes()+60),{start:B,end:H,allDay:!1}}(n,new Date);if(!d)return void alert("\u65e5\u4ed8\u3092\u8a8d\u8b58\u3067\u304d\u307e\u305b\u3093\u3067\u3057\u305f\u3002\n\u4f8b: 2012/06/30 10:00");!function(e,n){var d=a(n),s=new URLSearchParams;e.allDay?s.set("dates",t(e.start)+"/"+t(e.end)):(s.set("dates",r(e.start)+"/"+r(e.end)),s.set("ctz","Asia/Tokyo"));var u=a(String(document.title||"")),i=String(location&&location.href?location.href:""),m=d;i&&(m+="\n\nURL: "+i),s.set("text",(u||d).slice(0,80)),s.set("details",m);var l="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/r/eventedit?"+s.toString();window.open(l,"_blank","noopener,noreferrer")}(d,n)}catch(e){alert("Bookmarklet\u5b9f\u884c\u30a8\u30e9\u30fc:
